predicates.name: is_surviving_legal_cohabitant_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legal cohabitant of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_immovable_property
predicates.description: The asset is an immovable property.

predicates.name: served_as_principal_family_residence
predicates.description: The asset served as the principal family residence of the person at the time of the opening of the estate.

predicates.name: is_household_goods
predicates.description: The asset consists of household goods.

predicates.name: is_present_in
predicates.description: The first asset is present in the second asset.

predicates.name: subject_to_right_of_legal_return
predicates.description: The asset is subject to a right of legal return under article 4.24 or 4.25.

predicates.name: qualifies_for_cohabitant_usufruct
predicates.description: The asset qualifies for the surviving legal cohabitant's usufruct from the deceased person's estate.

predicates.name: obtains_usufruct
predicates.description: The person obtains the usufruct of the asset.
